IF_EXPR_CONSTR:
/* CONSTR-MET-any */ /*INSERT INTO IF_EXPR_CONSTR*/
SELECT * FROM AverageResponseTimeContext HAVING AverageResponseTimeContext.metricValue > 50.0
ELSE_EXPR_CONSTR:
/* CONSTR-MET-any */ /*INSERT INTO ELSE_EXPR_CONSTR*/
SELECT * FROM AverageResponseTimeContext HAVING AverageResponseTimeContext.metricValue > 10.0
GlobalReconfigurationRule:
/* SLO-any */ /*INSERT INTO GlobalReconfigurationRule*/
SELECT * FROM IF_THEN_CONSTR
THEN_EXPR_CONSTR:
/* CONSTR-MET-any */ /*INSERT INTO THEN_EXPR_CONSTR*/
SELECT * FROM AverageResponseTimeContext HAVING AverageResponseTimeContext.metricValue < 80.0

AverageResponseTimeContext:
/* COMP-CTX-AGG-any */ /*INSERT INTO AverageResponseTimeContext*/
SELECT EVALAGG( 'mean(RawResponseTime)', '',  ) AS metricValue,
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM 
OUTPUT LAST EVERY 5 SECONDS
